title: Capital Structure Financing
use_when: Use when comparing debt versus equity financing, modeling leverage, estimating WACC, performing APV, valuing bonds, analyzing tax shields, or explaining financing instruments and firm value.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for startup cap table, SAFE, convertible note, or liquidation preference work unless the user primarily needs broader financing structure analysis.
output_artifact: Capital-structure and financing analysis with EV/equity bridge, leverage, WACC/APV logic, financing side effects, and warnings
framework_fit: Best when the decision turns on financing mix, leverage, debt economics, or APV/WACC consistency.
failure_modes: Produces Capital-structure and financing analysis with EV/equity bridge, leverage, WACC/APV logic, financing side effects, and warnings without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Capital Structure Financing as generic Finance advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Capital Structure Financing when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $capital-structure-financing to compare debt and equity financing for this acquisition and show WACC/APV implications.
examples.expected_artifact: Capital-structure and financing analysis with EV/equity bridge, leverage, WACC/APV logic, financing side effects, and warnings
